body:
## Summary

[What is wrong or missing in the docs? One or two sentences.]

建议在文档中加入  关于 windows 用户在WSL中运行 copaw 遇到 agent error: APITimeoutError: Request timed out. 报错的解决办法。

## Type

- [ ] Typo / wording fix
- [ ] Outdated or incorrect content
- [ ] Missing section or topic
- [ ] Broken link or image
- [ ] Translation (zh/en)
- [√ ] Other

## Details

[Describe the issue or the change you suggest. If possible, point to the exact file or URL.]

**Current (if applicable):**
[Quote or describe current text.]

**Suggested:**
我发现在 WSL2 使用NAT 模式，尤其是windows 上安装有VPN情况下，CoPaw无法与各种模型服务商正常通信，测试模型链接全失败，最后发现是 WSL（ubuntu）网卡默认 MTU为 1500  改成 1350 就恢复正常。建议将这个影响使用的重要提示信息 写入 文档中。

## Additional Context

[Optional: related issues, screenshots, which audience this affects.]
title: [Docs]: WSL2 NAT网络环境下  agent error: APITimeoutError: Request timed out.
